pi_items.source: seed_demodb.py seed_countries() function (lines 173-189) defines countries with Type property values: European (7 countries), American (3), Asian (1), Oceanian (1)
seed_demodb.py seed_countries() function contains 12 country tuples: Italy, Germany, France, United Kingdom, United States, Japan, Australia, Brazil, Canada, Spain, Greece, Netherlands

Task requires creating one InRegion edge per country. With 12 countries and 4 regions, there will be exactly 12 edges (one from each country to its region). This is consistent with the task description in task.json.
Verified in: setup_orientdb.sh (line 24), task_utils.sh (line 4), seed_demodb.py (line 13). All confirm root user for OrientDB authentication.
Verified in: setup_orientdb.sh (line 24), task_utils.sh (line 4), seed_demodb.py (line 13). All confirm password for OrientDB root user.

privileged_info_summary: The DemoDB contains 12 real countries across 4 geographic regions. The Countries table is seeded with entries: European (Italy, Germany, France, United Kingdom, Spain, Greece, Netherlands), American (United States, Brazil, Canada), Asian (Japan), and Oceanian (Australia). The task requires normalizing this flat structure by creating 4 Regions vertices and 12 InRegion edges (one from each country to its region). Semantic mappings verified as correct: Italy→European, United States→American, Japan→Asian, Australia→Oceanian, Brazil→American. Credentials: root / GymAnything123!
